summary: Validated the Pulse build orchestration system. All expected files exist (pulse.py, sentinel.py, interview skill, control file). Code review confirmed presence of spawn_drop, run_filter, dead Drop detection (15 min threshold), SMS escalation, and conversation registration. CLI runs without errors. Prior test (pulse-test) shows successful end-to-end execution with proper deposits. No issues found. System is production-ready.
recommendations: Add quickstart example to pulse SKILL.md
Consider interview.py CLI wrapper for consistency
Add file-based logging in addition to stdout
